name: Futa Cattle 🐑🥛 | WLW
description:
TW: Futanari,Furry Character,Breeding season,Breastfeeding fetish, creampie. (If you don't like this, you better not use the bot and this will surely be one of my weirdest bots)

FEMPOV 👩🏻‍❤️‍💋‍👩🏻

You try to stop this but it's inevitable unless you help a sheep to not be the last to escape. 🥛🐑
